description_long: This bungalow features a prominent dark brown gable roof with a central chimney and a wide front porch supported by stone pillars and wooden railings. The front facade is characterized by a set of steps leading up to the porch, flanked by grassy strips and a paved walkway. The side elevations display a combination of white plastered walls and exposed wooden beams, with decorative timberwork under the eaves. Windows are symmetrically placed, with a large window on each side and no visible windows on the rear wall. The base of the structure is surrounded by stone paving, providing a sturdy and elevated foundation. The overall design blends rustic and traditional elements, making it suitable for suburban or park-like urban settings.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, wide front porch, stone base, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch with wooden railings, central steps, and the main entrance beneath the large gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white wall, large window, decorative timberwork under the eaves, and the extension of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white wall with no windows or doors, and the full span of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window, visible porch extension, and detailed wooden eaves.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with single large side windows
